scripts.expo-web: echo "Args: $@" > expo-log.txt && cd nama-app && PORT=3000 npx expo start --web -p 3000 >> expo-log.txt 2>&1
scripts.dev: node setup-gstudio.cjs && cd nama-app && node -e "const env = Object.assign({}, process.env, { CI: '1', EXPO_NO_DEVTOOLS: '1', HOST: '0.0.0.0', PORT: '3000' }); require('child_process').spawn(process.platform === 'win32' ? 'npx.cmd' : 'npx', ['expo', 'start', '--web', '--tunnel', '--port', '3000'], { stdio: 'inherit', env, shell: true });"
